subject: Fw: SIKORSKY S76C++
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: lvjet@aol.com

Date: Sat, 16 Feb 2008 00:14:38 
To:"Sarah Kellen" <kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Fw: SIKORSKY S76C++


Fwd this to je, thx,,,S76 sale possible
Sent from my BlackBerry® wireless handheld

-----Original Message-----
From: "Sean J. Lancaster " <slancaster@bristolassociates.com>

Date: Fri, 15 Feb 2008 19:06:43 
To:<lvjet@aol.com>
Subject: FW: SIKORSKY S76C++


He tells me that will pay $12.8 to MR. E but then want 3% commission.  They pay $13.184 and we get $12.8 net?  Thoughts I bet this will piss off Darren 
  
Best regards 
  
  
Sean J. Lancaster 
Bristol Associates Inc. 
1-540-665-5135 direct 
1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office 
1-540-533-8183 Mobile 
1-540-301-0050 FAX 
slancaster@bristolassociates.com <mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> 
www.bristolassociates.com <http://www.bristolassociates.com> 
  
This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message, please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2007 all rights reserved. 
  
 
From: corpomerica@aol.com [mailto:corpomerica@aol.com] 
 Sent: Friday, February 15, 2008 5:45 PM
 To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com
 Subject: Re: SIKORSKY S76C++ 
  
Sean we are expecting a fee of 3% of total sale. Please consult with the owner and if he acepts we may be closing in one week, depending on the bank.
 
 Best regards, 
 
 
Jose Moreau 
 
 
CORPOMERICA, INC. 
 
 
1304 SW 160 Avenue Ste 202 
 
 
Sunrise, Florida 33326 USA 
 
 
Tel (954) 389-5758 Fax (954) 389-8987 
 
 
Cell (954) 326-6692  
 
 -----Original Message-----
 From: Sean J. Lancaster <slancaster@bristolassociates.com>
 To: corpomerica@aol.com
 Sent: Fri, 15 Feb 2008 1:31 pm
 Subject: RE: SIKORSKY S76C++ 
 
 
 
Jose if you want to send me a letter outlining your fee proposal at a Sales Price at $13.0 million I will present it to the owner for their consideration and comment therein. I feel confident my client will be amenable to working with you.  Please be advised I am traveling all day Monday. 
 
  
 
 
Best regards 
 
  
 
  
 
Sean J. Lancaster 
 
Bristol Associates Inc. 
 
1-540-665-5135 direct 
 
1-202-682-4000 ext 1130 Main Office 
 
1-540-533-8183 Mobile 
 
1-540-301-0050 FAX 
 
slancaster@bristolassociates.com <mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> 
 
www.bristolassociates.com <http://www.bristolassociates.com/> 
 
  
 
This message may contain confidential and/or legally privileged information.  If you are not the intended recipient of the message, please destroy it. Any unauthorized dissemination, distribution or copying of the material in this message, and any attachments to the message, is strictly forbidden. (c) 2007 all rights reserved. 
 
  
 
 
----------------
 
 
From: corpomerica@aol.com <mailto:corpomerica@aol.com>  [mailto:corpomerica@aol.com <mailto:corpomerica@aol.com?> ] 
 Sent: Friday, February 15, 2008 1:23 PM
 To: slancaster@bristolassociates.com <mailto:slancaster@bristolassociates.com> 
 Subject: SIKORSKY S76C++ 
 
  
 
 
Bristol Associates, Inc.
 Washington DC
 Mr. Sean Lancaster
 
 Ref: 2007 SIKORSKY S-76C++
 
 Dear Mr. Lancaster
 
 Our company is dedicate to the purchase of aircrafts and helicopters as well as their equipment and parts. We have a customer interested in purchasing the helicopter in reference.
   
 We understand that the asking price is thirteen million dollars ($13,000,000) and we want to make an offer it. Our offer will be for the purchase and will include add-on for our commission. But before we proceed, we need to know if this is agreeable with the owner and then we would like to have a Fee Agreement signed by you or the owner. 
 
 
We are ready to proceed, please confirm. 
 
 
Kind regards, 
 
 
Jose Moreau 
 
 
CORPOMERICA, INC. 
 
 
1304 SW 160 Avenue Ste 202 
 
 
Sunrise, Florida 33326 USA 
 
 
Tel (954) 389-5758 Fax (954) 389-8987 
 
 
Mob (954) 326-6692
